# AitoTech — llms.txt

> AitoTech builds websites, mobile apps, AI tools, and workflow automation
> for small businesses and enterprises. Based in Delhi, India. Founded 2026.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in
- Location: Delhi, India

## Services
- Business Websites: https://aitotech.in/services/website-development
- Mobile Apps (Android & iOS): https://aitotech.in/services/mobile-apps
- Workflow & WhatsApp Automation: https://aitotech.in/services/workflow-automation
- AI Tools & Chatbots: https://aitotech.in/services/custom-ai
- Invoice Intelligence: https://aitotech.in/services/invoice-intelligence
- Data Automation: https://aitotech.in/services/data-automation

## Demos & Templates
- URL: https://aitotech.in/demos
- What: Website templates (business, e-commerce, restaurant, clinic, real estate,
  portfolio) and automation demos (WhatsApp bot, invoice → ERP, lead capture + CRM,
  AI chatbot). Businesses can request a personalised demo before committing.

## Shipped products (proof of work)
- Outreach: https://aitotech.in/products/outreach — AI sales app for bank teams
  in India (MCA/GST leads by PIN code, AI-written outreach, WhatsApp send). Live pilot.
- Routely: https://aitotech.in/routely — AI coding platform (Omni chat, Harness IDE,
  Hermes memory, automatic model routing). Beta.

## Contact
- Enquiries: https://aitotech.in/contact
- Response time: within 24 hours on business days

## FAQ
- Q: What does AitoTech do?
  A: End-to-end websites, apps, AI tools, and business automation — design, build,
  deploy, and maintain.
- Q: Who is it for?
  A: Small and mid-size businesses as well as enterprises, in India and abroad.
- Q: How does an engagement start?
  A: Share your requirement at https://aitotech.in/demos — AitoTech replies with a
  personalised demo within 1–2 business days.
